## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, reporting, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sydney is taking over Andre's responsibilities, working through existing documents and videos](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Content generation continues with 11 new articles planned, focusing on various Strapi topics](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Team to conduct a deep dive on Strapi's strategy, including comparison pages and content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Strapi aims to capture non-branded keyword traffic and improve conversion tracking for open-source downloads](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation and Publishing

  - [8 articles from last week pending publication due to Theo's absence](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [11 new articles planned for generation this week](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Team to deprioritize competitor-focused content and focus on non-branded keywords](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Integration pages: 2 new ones to be created, old ones to be reformatted](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Sydney building a new report in Looker Studio for easier access to data](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Team to focus on metrics beyond impressions and clicks, aiming to track conversions](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Strapi uses HubSpot campaigns for attribution, considering giving GrowthX access](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

### Strategic Focus and Goals

  - [Priority on capturing non-branded keyword traffic](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Comparison pages aim to drive traffic and ultimately lead to Strapi trials](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Challenges in tracking full conversion path due to open-source nature of the product](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Team to explore new content formats, including potential glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Strapi working on improving data quality in Amplitude for better A/B testing](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [Telemetry data available but anonymous, limiting user journey tracking](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Potential to add more detailed event tracking in Google Analytics for quick start guide interactions](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

### Internationalization

  - [Considering creating "Why Strapi" pages in key languages (Japanese, Chinese, Spanish)](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Strapi supports internationalization, starting with one page as a test](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Victor to provide list and format document for integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Victor to share access to Notion document with new template](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Sydney and Jason to conduct deep dive on Strapi's strategy, including comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Team to explore adding more detailed event tracking in Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Golzar to verify and share information about quick start guide tracking on docs](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Victor to consider giving GrowthX access to HubSpot campaign data for better attribution insights](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Team to continue content generation and publishing as planned](https://fathom.video/share/t-MVh6xs9KRWd3RBVwSDX6pHLqzbf5xP?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
